headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise After Oil Prices Spur Market Sell-Off; Dell, Micron Lead 7 Stocks To Watch
summary: Oil prices surged to their highest close since 2022, sending the major indexes tumbling. Dell and Micron are among stocks worth watching.

headline: Atlas Energy Solutions (AESI) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of proppant sand producer Atlas Energy Solutions (NYSE:AESI) jumped 2.7% in the afternoon session after the stock's positive momentum continued as recently agreed with Caterpillar to acquire power generation assets, amid a broader rally in the energy sector fueled by surging crude oil prices.

headline: Qnity Drops 7.9%. It Was a Bad Day for Semiconductor Stocks.
summary: Semiconductor stocks took it on the chin Thursday.  Instead, investors should look at oil and interest rates.  Shares of semiconductor manufacturing materials company  Qnity Electronics  which was spun out from  DuPont de Nemours  in late 2025, dropped 7.9%.

headline: Deere, Caterpillar and 10 Other Stocks for an AI-Infused Blue Collar Renaissance
summary: Artificial intelligence is the angel and demon fueling most stock trades these days, whether boosting companies tied to hyperscalers’ hyperspending on AI data centers or tanking software companies’ shares on fears of permanent irrelevance.  “Justifiable attention has been paid to [AI’s] impact on the white-collar workforce,” wrote Oppenheimer analysts led by Colin Rusch in a Thursday report.  “As such, we see a multi-year supportive backdrop across our Industrial Innovation coverage universe where we see the picks and shovels of this next wave of the Industrial Revolution; physical AI, power, and the machines that make the machines that power, build, and feed the world,” added Rusch.

raw.headline: Deere, Caterpillar and 10 Other Stocks for an AI-Infused Blue Collar Renaissance

headline: Caterpillar AI Rental Refresh Puts Services And Margins In Focus
summary: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) has launched a brand refresh for Cat Rentals, introducing an updated visual identity and customer experience. The company is rolling out a digital upgrade for its rental platform, integrating Cat AI Assistant and expanded telematics capabilities. The move focuses on modernizing equipment rentals and supporting customers with better fleet management and operational insights. Caterpillar’s rental business sits alongside its core equipment manufacturing and services,...
